content: Pop and indie-pop songs usually perform well for users who ask for upbeat and high-valence tracks.
Lofi tracks with moderate energy and higher acousticness are often preferred for focus and study contexts.
High-energy rock and metal songs are reliable matches when users request intense listening sessions.
Users who explicitly prefer acoustic sounds usually respond better to songs with high acousticness and softer mood tags.
Party-oriented profiles correlate with high danceability and euphoric mood tags.
Recommendation quality improves when repeated artists and genres are penalized to avoid narrow result sets.
